content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to eliminate the blind spots that come with single-perspective iterative refinement. This combination creates a self-improving LLM system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional supervised training or external data, while resolving its common limitation of getting stuck in local optima from repeated single-perspective feedback.
